description_long: This is a beaded necklace featuring a series of round and irregularly shaped beads in soft pastel hues, predominantly blue, green, and white. The beads are strung together on a thin, likely transparent or lightly colored string, creating a delicate and airy appearance. The necklace is displayed on a white, matte-finished bust stand, which accentuates the subtle iridescence and color variation of the beads. The beads appear to be made of glass or semi-precious stones, with some having a marbled or opalescent finish. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on the natural beauty and color of the beads. The clasp is not visible, but the necklace is likely secured with a standard jewelry clasp at the back.
description: A delicate beaded necklace with pastel blue, green, and white beads, strung on a thin string and displayed on a white bust. The design is simple and highlights the natural beauty of the beads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of beads, with the largest and most colorful beads centered.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the necklace's curvature and the way the beads wrap around the bust.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the necklace's closure area and the even distribution of smaller beads along the back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the necklace's profile and bead spacing.
